name: Creative
title: Creative - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: One-page creative agency landing with smooth scroll navigation. Fixed navbar with brand and 4 anchor links (About, Services, Portfolio, Contact) that becomes white with shadow on scroll. Fullscreen masthead hero with background image, warm brown overlay, centered heading, orange accent divider line, subtitle, and Find Out More CTA button. About section (primary blue bg) with centered text and CTA. Services section with centered heading, orange divider, and 4-column icon feature grid using Bootstrap Icons (gem, laptop, globe, heart) with titles and descriptions. Portfolio section: edge-to-edge 6-image grid (3x2 on desktop) with hover overlay showing category and project name, using SimpleLightbox for fullscreen viewing. Dark call-to-action section with centered text. Contact section with form (name, email, phone, message) and phone number. Light gray footer with copyright.

colorPalette.masthead: rgba(92, 77, 66, 0.8) (warm brown overlay on bg image)
colorPalette.heading: #212529 (near-black)

typography.style: Warm serif/sans-serif pairing, bold headings with readable body text

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar with scroll-triggered shrink effect. Fullscreen hero with vh-100. Container-based sections with 8rem vertical padding. Portfolio uses edge-to-edge fluid container (max 1920px) with 6-column grid. Responsive collapses at 992px.
visualStyle: Warm and inviting creative agency aesthetic with orange accents, full-width imagery, generous section padding, and smooth scroll transitions. Professional yet approachable.

name: Grayscale
title: Grayscale - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Dark-themed one-page landing with grayscale aesthetic and teal accents. Transparent navbar that becomes white on scroll with brand and 3 anchor links (About, Projects, Contact). Fullscreen masthead with background image, gradient overlay fading from transparent to black, large heading in Varela Round font, subtitle, and teal Get Started button. About section (black bg) with centered white heading, description text in white-50, and a large iPad mockup image. Projects section (light bg) with featured project row (8-col image + 4-col text card), then 2 alternating project rows with side-by-side image and black text card layout. Signup section with background image, gradient overlay, email subscription form. Contact section (black bg) with 3 info cards (Address, Email, Phone) each with teal icon. Social links row (Twitter, Facebook, GitHub). Black footer with copyright.

typography.style: Rounded sans-serif headings with soft body font, modern and approachable

layoutDetails: Fixed transparent navbar that transitions to white on scroll. Fullscreen masthead with gradient overlay. Container-based sections. Projects use asymmetric col-xl-8/col-xl-4 layout with alternating image/text positions. Contact cards in 3-column col-md-4 grid. Responsive collapses at 992px.
visualStyle: Moody dark theme with grayscale imagery, gradient overlays fading to black, teal accent color, and rounded typography. Sophisticated and atmospheric.

name: Landing Page
title: Landing Page - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Product/service landing page with email signup focus. Light navbar with brand and Sign Up button. Fullscreen masthead with background image, dark navy overlay (#1c375e at opacity), centered heading, subtitle, and prominent email signup form with Submit button. Features icons section (light bg) with 3-column layout, each with large Bootstrap Icon (window, layers, terminal), heading, and description. Showcase section with 3 alternating rows: each has a half-width background image on one side and text content on the other, alternating left/right positions. Testimonials section (light bg) with 3 circular avatar photos, names, and quotes in a 3-column grid. Call-to-action section with background image, dark overlay, heading, and another email signup form. Footer (light bg) with 2-column layout: left has nav links and copyright, right has social icons (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram).

typography.style: Clean sans-serif throughout, professional and readable

layoutDetails: Static light navbar. Fullscreen masthead with background image and overlay. Container-based sections. Features use 3-column col-lg-4 grid. Showcase uses alternating col-lg-6 rows with background-image and text. Testimonials in 3-column grid with circular avatars. Footer is 2-column col-lg-6. Responsive at standard Bootstrap breakpoints.
visualStyle: Professional marketing landing page with dark hero, alternating image/text showcase rows, circular testimonial avatars, and dual email signup CTAs. Clean and conversion-focused.

name: Elevate
title: Elevate
description: Single-page product landing with a minimal fixed header (logo + hamburger menu). Slide-out navigation panel with links (Home, Features, Product Info, Stats, Pricing, Testimonials, Download, Newsletter) and sponsor text. Hero section with centered intro subtitle, large 2-line heading, two stroke buttons (Features, Download), and large app screenshot image below. Features section with centered intro and 6-feature grid (3x2) with numbered counters (01-06). Product Info section with 2 alternating info entries: app screenshot with half-gray background alongside subtitle, heading, description, and Learn More button; second entry swaps sides with embedded Vimeo video. Stats section with 6-column counter grid (110 Projects, 9050 Clients, 210 Awards, 123 Ideas, 1500 Coffees, 7200 Hours) with line icons. Pricing section with 3-tier cards (Starter $4.99, Standard $9.99 highlighted, Premium $29.99). Testimonials slider. Download section with app store badges. Newsletter subscribe section. Footer with social links and copyright.

typography.style: Single font family (Roboto) with extreme weight contrast. Black weight for headings, regular for body. Large base font size. Uppercase subtitles.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with centered container. Features use 3-column grid with numbered counters. Product Info uses alternating 2-column layout with half-gray backgrounds. Stats use 6-column grid. Pricing uses 3-column cards. Responsive at 400-1024px.
visualStyle: Bold, energetic landing with golden yellow accent and navy dark sections. Large app screenshot in hero. Numbered feature counters. Alternating content/media layout for product info. Dark stats section with counter animation. Three-tier pricing with highlighted middle plan.

name: Dream Pulse
title: Dream Pulse TemplateMo
description: Single-page portfolio/agency template with fixed left sidebar navigation on dark semi-transparent background. Sidebar (400px wide) contains a double-bordered brand box with 'Dream Pulse' title, vertical right-aligned navigation with 5 links (Intro, About, Work, Clients, Let's Talk) each with a white square indicator that appears on hover/active with blink animation, social media links (Facebook, Twitter, Dribbble, LinkedIn) as white rounded squares, and footer copyright. Main content scrolls on the right side. Intro section has a parallax background image with a semi-transparent white box containing title and description text. About section on white background shows 2 columns with large Font Awesome icons (balance-scale, building), section titles in teal (#069), and descriptive paragraphs. Work section displays 8 gallery items in a Slick carousel with hover effect (bubba effect - border animation on hover with title overlay). Clients section shows 8 client logo images in a 4-column grid. Contact/Talk section splits into left double-bordered box with address info and right contact form with bottom-border-only inputs and teal SEND button.

typography.style: Large 18px body text with generous 2x line-height, uppercase navigation and titles

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar 400px wide with flexbox column layout. Main content width calc(100% - 400px) with margin-left auto. Sections max-width 1275px with 66px/60px padding. Parallax background on intro. Gallery uses Slick carousel with custom widths at breakpoints. Sidebar collapses on mobile.
visualStyle: Elegant portfolio with fixed dark sidebar and clean white content. Teal accent color. Double-border decorative elements. Parallax hero. Hover gallery effects. Generous whitespace and large typography.

name: Lava Landing Page
title: Lava Landing Page HTML Template
description: App landing page template with preloader animation and sticky header navigation featuring 'Lava' text logo and 5 links (Home, About, Testimonials, Drop Down submenu, Contact Us). Welcome section has a left-aligned layout with heading containing emphasized 'CREATE' text, description paragraph, and 'KNOW US BETTER' CTA button, with scroll-reveal entrance animations. About section displays 3 numbered feature cards (01 Trend Analysis, 02 Site Optimization, 03 Email Design) each with icon image, title, description, and Read More button. Promotion section uses 2-column layout: left column with app mockup image, right column with 3 icon-labeled feature items. Decorative left and right image elements flank the content. Testimonials section has centered heading and an Owl Carousel showing 4 testimonial cards with author avatars, star ratings, names, quotes, and roles. Footer/Contact section with 3-column layout (about text with social icons, quick links, contact info). Bottom copyright bar.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with clean hierarchy and emphasized text styling

layoutDetails: Sticky header with scroll-triggered background. Left-aligned hero content. 3-column feature card grid. 2-column promotion section (5-col image + 6-col text). Owl Carousel for testimonials. Decorative side images. Responsive at 1420px, 1320px, 1140px, 992px, 810px.
visualStyle: Modern and clean app landing aesthetic with coral/salmon accent color. Scroll-reveal animations add dynamism. Numbered feature cards and app mockup imagery. Professional SaaS marketing feel.

name: New Vision
title: New Vision HTML CSS Template
description: Landing page template with blue (#0099FF) accent color and light gray (#ddd) background. Navbar with collapsible menu. Welcome section with heading and introductory text. Featured section with carousel displaying items in a sliding showcase (12 images total). Content cards with rose/mauve (#CC9999) secondary accent. Open Sans font at 400 and 800 weights for strong heading contrast. Font Awesome 5 and Feather Icons for iconography. Bootstrap grid for responsive layout.

typography.style: Extra-bold headings with regular body, strong visual hierarchy

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid layout. Collapsible navbar. Welcome section. Featured carousel with sliding items. Light gray body with white content areas. 7 responsive breakpoints.
visualStyle: Clean, modern landing page with bright blue accents on light gray background. Carousel showcase creates dynamic featured content area.

name: Dtox
title: Dtox
description: SaaS/app landing page with light theme and blue accent. Fixed-top navigation with single-page scroll links (Home, Feature, About, Service, Team, Pricing, Contact). Hero section with large heading, email input with Get Started button, and app screenshot. Features section with icon cards. SEO/marketing section with split layout and device mockup. Services section with icon cards. Team section with member cards and social links. Pricing section with 3 plan cards. Client logos section. Newsletter subscription section. Footer with 4 columns and bottom bar with social icons.
layoutDetails: Bootstrap container, single-page scroll sections, split layouts with device mockups, 3-column pricing grid, responsive at 1200px/991px/767px/575px
visualStyle: Modern SaaS landing page with blue accents, app mockups, pricing cards, and clean professional layout

name: Soft Landing
title: Soft Landing Page by Tooplate
description: SaaS landing page with preloader, fixed nav, hero with email signup form over stellar parallax background. Bootstrap tabs with laptop mockup. Three team members. Testimonial carousel. Three-tier pricing. Contact form with Google Maps.
layoutDetails: Single-page landing. Hero with email signup. Tabbed features. Three-column pricing.
visualStyle: Professional SaaS landing with dark parallax hero, orange accent.
